src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/Web.general_idea: Remove the @EnableRedisConfiguration annotation from the main application class.
Add import for BufferingApplicationStartup to support startup metrics.
Configure SpringApplication with BufferingApplicationStartup to capture startup metrics.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Add Content Security Policy and Referrer Policy headers configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Security headers configuration was moved from implicit or separate filters to explicit HttpSecurity headers configuration in the new DSL.
Custom post-processor for security interceptors needs to be explicitly added in the new authorizeHttpRequests DSL.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Add RestSecurityLoggingConfig to REST security filter chain.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Custom logging configuration needs to be explicitly added in the new SecurityFilterChain bean.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Configure LTI13Configurer with HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository in catch-all chain.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: LTI configuration needs to be explicitly set up in the new SecurityFilterChain bean with proper security context repository.
SecurityProperties.BASIC_AUTH_ORDER is no longer used after replacing @Order values with explicit integers.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Update @Order values from SecurityProperties.BASIC_AUTH_ORDER offsets to explicit integers.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: SecurityProperties.BASIC_AUTH_ORDER is no longer referenced; explicit order values are needed for filter chain ordering.
New class is required for the updated security configuration.
New class is required for the updated security configuration.
New class is required for LTI configuration in the updated security setup.
New class is required for referrer policy header configuration.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Remove WebSecurity import as it's no longer directly used.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: WebSecurity is no longer directly configured; WebSecurityCustomizer is used instead.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Move LmsDefaultGrantedAuthoritiesMapper field to class level and autowire it.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: The mapper is now used in multiple filter chains, so it needs to be a class-level field.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.after: @Autowired private LmsDefaultGrantedAuthoritiesMapper lmsDefaultGrantedAuthoritiesMapper; // at class level

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Remove /actuator/** from ignored paths in WebSecurityCustomizer.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Actuator endpoints may need security configuration rather than being ignored.
These paths may need security configuration rather than being ignored.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Restrict Swagger configuration to a specific profile to prevent it from loading in production environments.
Explicitly declare the security requirement in the OpenAPI definition to ensure the OAuth2 scheme is applied to all operations.
Define a specific API group to limit the scanned packages for documentation generation.
Update commented-out error attribute key to use jakarta namespace.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Update JPQL queries to use boolean literals instead of integer comparisons for boolean fields.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: While JPQL often supports integer comparison for booleans, using explicit boolean literals (true/false) is the standard and safer approach in modern JPA providers to avoid type ambiguity or deprecation warnings.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Update JPQL query to use entity relationship navigation instead of raw field access.
